action.reasoning: Observation: Starting the experiment. Analysis: We need to train an RL agent on 10 Minigrid environments. To establish a baseline and measure iteration time, I will train a separate PPO model for each environment for a very small number of timesteps (10,000). I will use a custom observation wrapper to flatten the image and direction into a 1D array, allowing the use of SB3's MlpPolicy. Decision: Write wrapper.py, train.py, and predict.py, install minigrid, run the training script, and submit for evaluation.
